query:
ALTER TABLE partner_cities
ADD COLUMN venueContractFileUrl TEXT COMMENT '场地合同文件URL（S3存储）',
ADD COLUMN venueRentAmount DECIMAL(10, 2) COMMENT '房租金额',
ADD COLUMN venueDeposit DECIMAL(10, 2) COMMENT '押金',
ADD COLUMN venueLeaseStartDate DATE COMMENT '起租日期',
ADD COLUMN venueLeaseEndDate DATE COMMENT '到期日期',
ADD COLUMN venuePaymentCycle ENUM('monthly', 'bimonthly', 'quarterly', 'semiannual', 'annual') COMMENT '付款方式：月付、两月付、季付、半年付、年付';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute 
ALTER TABLE partner_cities
ADD COLUMN venueContractFileUrl TEXT COMMENT '场地合同文件URL（S3存储）',
ADD COLUMN venueRentAmount DECIMAL(10, 2) COMMENT '房租金额',
ADD COLUMN venueDeposit DECIMAL(10, 2) COMMENT '押金',
ADD COLUMN venueLeaseStartDate DATE COMMENT '起租日期',
ADD COLUMN venueLeaseEndDate DATE COMMENT '到期日期',
ADD COLUMN venuePaymentCycle ENUM('monthly', 'bimonthly', 'quarterly', 'semiannual', 'annual') COMMENT '付款方式：月付、两月付、季付、半年付、年付';
